name: The Undead Square
description:
You are standing on the undead square.  Huge marble steps lead up to the
temple gate.  The entrance to the ex - Clerics' Guild is to the west, and the former
Grunting Boar Inn, is to the east.  Just south of here you see the dead pool
square, the center of this fallen city.

exits.description: You see the good old Grunting Boar Inn.
You see the entrance to the Clerics' Guild.
